description: A square (1080x1080) social-media 'news card' from the U.S. Department of Labor. The background is a darkened, desaturated photograph of a meat-processing/packing plant: a worker in a white coat/lab smock and blue nitrile gloves handling raw poultry or meat in clear plastic clamshell trays moving along a stainless-steel production line; additional blurred workers appear in the background. A semi-transparent dark gradient overlay is applied so the white text reads clearly. In the upper area a small blue rectangular badge/label holds white italic text 'LABOR NEWS'. Below it, large bold white sans-serif headline text reads 'US Department of Labor secures agreement with JBS USA, nation's largest meat packing processor, to address child labor'. At the bottom-right is the bold white URL 'dol.gov/newsroom'.
notable_text: LABOR NEWS. US Department of Labor secures agreement with JBS USA, nation's largest meat packing processor, to address child labor. dol.gov/newsroom
